title: Create: Applied Energistics 2
description: Applied Energistics 2 in the style of Create
body:
This pack revamps Applied Energistics 2 to match to Create art style much better. Changing and supplemented the textures and visuals of the blocks and items.

![Changes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/590d41d385b7fb08a18b81e5c85a136456853157.png)
